overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush summer forest path that opens up to a scenic lakeside with the city of Beauclair visible on a distant hill. The character transitions from a wooded trail to a sandy beach and finally enters the shallow water while the camera smoothly follows from behind.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense forest vegetation

entered.detail: Tall deciduous trees forming a dense canopy overhead with dappled sunlight filtering through
Narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass
Small red wooden building with white trim visible through the trees on the left side
Large stone castle and city perched on a distant hill, partially visible through the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense summer forest with tall trees forming a canopy overhead. Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path surrounded by lush green vegetation and wildflowers. A red wooden farmhouse appears on the left side through the trees, while the distant silhouette of Beauclair castle becomes visible ahead through the foliage.

events.description: exits dense forest canopy into open clearing with first clear view of the lake and distant castle

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing forward as the forest opens up to reveal the scenic waterfront and distant city

entered.detail: Calm blue lake water becoming visible as the forest opens up
Wooden sailing vessel with tan sails on the lake near the far shore
Cluster of stone and wooden buildings along the distant lake shore
Small wooden rowboat pulled up on the near shore

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide clearing revealing a scenic lakeside view. The dense canopy gives way to open sky as Geralt approaches the water's edge. Beauclair castle dominates the distant hill across the lake, while a sailing ship and beached rowboat appear along the shoreline. The red farmhouse recedes into the background on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach along calm lake shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sandy shoreline with the lake on his right and the castle visible ahead

entered.detail: Light-colored sandy shore replacing the dirt path along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to sandy beach as Geralt follows the shoreline. The forest is now completely behind him, replaced by open waterfront with the lake extending to the right. The beached rowboat sits on the sand nearby, while the sailing ship moves across the distant water. Beauclair castle remains prominent on the left horizon.

events.description: character steps from sandy beach into shallow lake water, creating ripples

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading into the shallow water, looking around at the scenic lake and distant castle

entered.detail: Jagged rock formations and mountains visible on the distant right horizon across the lake
Clear shallow water with visible sandy bottom where Geralt is walking

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps into the shallow lake water, which is clear enough to see the sandy bottom beneath. The camera follows as he wades along the shore, with Beauclair castle still dominating the left skyline. Distinctive rock spires become visible on the distant right horizon. The beached boat and sailing ship shift in perspective as the character moves through the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit lakeside vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path under a dense canopy of summer trees, passing a red wooden farmhouse as the silhouette of Beauclair castle first emerges through the foliage. As the forest thins, the scene expands into a wide clearing where the canopy gives way to an open sky, revealing a sailing ship and a beached rowboat along the water's edge. The terrain then shifts to a sandy beach as the camera follows Geralt along the shoreline, leaving the woods behind while the castle remains prominent on the distant horizon. Finally, the movement leads Geralt into the clear, shallow lake water, wading past the shoreline as distant rock spires appear on the right horizon.
